name: slack-mcp
description: MCP server for Slack workspaces using session tokens. Automatic browser-based token extraction, stealth reads, channel caching.

tools.name: check-unreads
tools.description: Unread messages across DMs, channels, and mentions

tools.name: catch-up
tools.description: Recent channel activity with time filtering

tools.name: search
tools.description: Find messages using full Slack query syntax

tools.name: send-message
tools.description: Post to channel, DM, or thread

xoxc_token.title: Slack xoxc Token
xoxc_token.description: Session token from Slack. Run the auth-setup tool to extract automatically, or leave blank to use the built-in setup flow.

xoxd_token.title: Slack xoxd Cookie
xoxd_token.description: Session cookie from Slack. Run the auth-setup tool to extract automatically, or leave blank to use the built-in setup flow.
